summary: Iteration 108 - Agent Versioning, Training Analytics, Auto-Refresh, Conversation Learning. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified - Analytics tab shows stats/charts/gaps/coverage, Versions tab shows version history with create/rollback/delete. Auto-refresh toggle and Skills Matrix Training Depth toggle exist in code but require scrolling/navigation to view.

issues: Auto-refresh toggle is at the bottom of the Training Dashboard - may require scrolling to see on smaller viewports

critical_code_review_comments: Versioning API implements full CRUD + rollback with pre-rollback auto-snapshot
Analytics endpoints return top/low performers, knowledge gaps, topic coverage, category distribution
Timeseries endpoint supports configurable days parameter (7/30/90)
Auto-refresh settings API correctly clamps interval_days to 1-365 range
Conversation learning extracts Q&A from thumbs_up reactions on agent messages

success_rate.frontend: 95% - All main components verified, minor viewport scroll issues

seed_data_creation: Test versions created during testing (auto-deleted on delete tests)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 108 features verified: 1) Agent Versioning - POST/GET/DELETE versions, POST rollback all working. Pre-rollback auto-snapshot created on rollback. Versions shown in UI with labels, dates, knowledge counts. 2) Training Analytics - effectiveness endpoint returns top/low performers with effectiveness_score. gaps endpoint returns skill-based gaps, topic coverage, category distribution. timeseries returns daily aggregated data with configurable period. 3) Auto-Refresh - GET/PUT endpoints working. Interval clamps to 1-365 days. Toggle component implemented. 4) Conversation Learning - thumbs_up reaction on agent messages triggers knowledge extraction. Returns learned: true and chunk_id when successful. 5) Skills Matrix Training Depth toggle exists (data-testid='training-overlay-toggle') in heatmap view.

agent_versioning.create_version: PASS - POST creates snapshot with knowledge_chunk_ids
agent_versioning.list_versions: PASS - Returns versions array with total count
agent_versioning.get_version_detail: PASS - Returns full snapshot with name, model, skills, training
agent_versioning.rollback: PASS - Creates pre-rollback snapshot, restores config and knowledge
agent_versioning.delete_version: PASS - Deletes and returns 404 on subsequent GET

training_analytics.effectiveness: PASS - Returns top_performers, low_performers, total_chunks, chunks_used
training_analytics.gaps: PASS - Returns gaps array, topic_coverage, category_distribution, agent_skills
training_analytics.timeseries: PASS - Returns timeline array, period_days, summary with all metrics

auto_refresh.get_settings: PASS - Returns auto_refresh boolean, interval_days, last_trained
auto_refresh.set_settings: PASS - Toggles enabled and sets interval_days

frontend_components.training_analytics_js: PASS - Shows stats, charts, gaps, topic coverage, category mix
frontend_components.agent_versioning_js: PASS - Shows version history list, create/rollback/delete buttons
